About The Resort

Your Gateway To Wayanad's Finest Experiences

Tucked along the Thalassery–Mysore road in Kattikkulam, Wayanad Gate Resort rises against the green hills of Mananthavady like a quiet promise of comfort. Our signature blue-tiled roofs and whitewashed courtyards welcome you into a world where luxury hospitality meets the unhurried rhythm of nature.

Every corner of the resort has been shaped to hold a feeling — the warmth of a family gathered after a long drive, the calm of a private balcony at dusk, the quiet thrill of waking up to mist over the hills. We built this place to be your gateway: to rest, to relaxation, and to the authentic beauty of Wayanad.

From premium accommodation to thoughtfully designed gardens and gathering spaces, Wayanad Gate Resort is a destination for couples, families and weekend travellers seeking a memorable, scenic escape without compromise on comfort.

Stay With Us

Luxury Rooms Designed For Comfort

Each room and cottage at Wayanad Gate Resort is crafted for restful comfort, blending modern amenities with warm, locally inspired interiors and views of the surrounding greenery.

Deluxe Heritage Room

Spacious interiors with handcrafted wooden detailing, plush bedding and a calm, private atmosphere for true relaxation.

Premium ComfortModern Amenities

Garden Wood Cottage

Standalone timber cottages set among the trees, offering privacy, fresh air and an intimate connection with nature.

Scenic ViewsPrivate Comfort

Family Garden Suite

Generously sized suites ideal for families, opening onto landscaped gardens and the resort's signature courtyards.

The Resort Experience

Luxury Living, At The Pace Of Nature

At Wayanad Gate Resort, time slows down. Mornings begin with birdsong and mist rolling over the hills; evenings end with quiet conversations on a private balcony. This is luxury defined not by excess, but by ease — the freedom to simply be.

Whether you've come for a family vacation, a weekend retreat, or a private escape from routine, our resort offers a setting for memorable stays: scenic surroundings, premium hospitality, and moments that linger long after you've left.

Discover Wayanad

A Landscape Made For Wonder

Wayanad is a district of green hills, mist-covered valleys and winding scenic drives that reveal a new view at every turn. From quiet nature trails to encounters with native wildlife, the district rewards the curious traveller with authentic Kerala charm at every step.

The climate here stays fresh and cool through the year, carrying the scent of spice plantations and damp earth after rain. Sunrise over the hills paints the valley gold, while the evenings settle into a peaceful stillness rarely found elsewhere.

Wayanad Gate Resort places you at the centre of all this — close enough to explore, peaceful enough to simply breathe it in.
